name: Lastra Table Lamp - 20.5 Inch Height - TBL4381 - Dark Brown - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Lastra table lamp, a stunning addition to your home decor. Standing at 20.5 inches, this dark brown resin lamp offers both elegance and functionality. Its sleek design effortlessly complements various styles, making it the perfect choice for any room. Crafted with 80 percent rein body and 20 percent iron neck, this lamp provides a sturdy and stylish lighting solution. The dark brown finish adds a touch of sophistication, enhancing the ambiance of your space. Whether placed on a bedside table or in the living room, Lastra brings warmth and character to any setting. Illuminate your surroundings with style and make a statement with the Lastra table lamp.
